## Checklist

- [ ] I opened an issue first to discuss this change (for non-trivial features)
- [ ] `ruff check src/` passes
- [ ] `pytest tests/ -v` passes
- [ ] I added/updated tests where it makes sense
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] I updated the docs (README / CONTRIBUTING) if behavior changed
